3198880.name: DAWN
3198880.description:
WITNESS THE DAWN! A new horror stirs in The American West. Survive as one of two characters, solo, or together with a friend.

It was just supposed to be another ordinary night. A storm raging outside, rain tapping on the windows - when suddenly - a banging at the door.

—

Following the events of DAWN: CALM BEFORE THE STORM DEMO, with limited power restored to the facility - play solo as either 1 of 2 characters, or cooperatively with a friend, and cautiously make your way to the lower levels of the now desolate complex.

-

Continuing the story as Trey, or as his “colleague”, your goal will be to access the lower floors, and find a way to escape. Unfortunately for you, the front door is locked, and the correct key must be found in order to open it.

As you explore the facility, you’ll bare witness to what has become of your former workplace; and to those who occupy it.


Think fast. Keep safe - and your distance; Work together, or alone, and see if you have what it takes to escape, survive and witness - DAWN.

---
